titleStmt.title: SII 26.163: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 163. (A.R. No. 155 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

p.hi: Kōṉērinmēṉkoṇḍāṉ: Vīra-chōḷa ?: No date: accn. 1183 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged slightly. It registers the gift, made by the king of paddy in favour of the Piḍāri temple of the ugachchar in a village (name lost) in Vaikāvi-nāḍu and the Kāḷā-piḍāri temple of Karaivaḻi-nāḍu, the gift being entrusted to a certain Kaṇṇabhaṭṭaṉ, a dēvakanmi of the temple of Vīrachōḻīśvaramuḍaiyār. It is stipulated that this person should render certain services in lieu of the gift-paddy. It is attested by Uttaramantiri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: svastiśrī . konerimeṉkoṇṭāṉ Āḷuṭaiyār viracoḻiśvaramuṭaiyār koyiliṟ tevarkaṉmi kaṇṇapaṭṭaṉukku nammolaikuṭutta paricāvatu vaikāvināṭṭu lkaḷukku Ukaccar piṭāri koyiloṉṟukku kārpacāṉamaḷakku nelaiṅkalam koḷvāṉākavum karaivaḻināṭṭuk kāḷāpiṭāri koyiloṉṟukkuk kārpicāṉamaḷakku nelaiṅkalam kaik koṇṭu tirumeṟpūccuñ citāriyuñ celuttuvatāka nammolai kuṭuttom In neṟ koḷḷumiṭattu Ikkoyiliṟ tevarkaṉmikaḷ taravukoṇṭu kuṭukka Ippaṭikkivai Uttaramantiri Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.163 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
